/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/SDL_learning.dir/src/bmpImageDisplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SDL_learning.dir/src/textDisplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SDL_learning.dir/src/healthBar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SDL_learning.dir/src/animatedSprites.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SDL_learning.dir/src/gameState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SDL_learning.dir/src/camera.cpp.o -o SDL_learning  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pedro/CLionProjects/SDL_learning/build libSDL3_image.so.0.5.0 libSDL3_ttf.so.0.3.0 libSDL3.so.0.5.0
